arts.ttl: Daniel Farke already knows Leeds United's biggest task for Blackburn test
arts.sum: Leeds United know they will have to do something they have not managed in their previous two meetings against a John Eustace side when they face Blackburn Rovers at Elland Road on New Year's Day. By joining the Leeds United community on WhatsApp, you'll see the biggest and best stories as soon as they happen.

arts.ttl: Blackburn 'excited' for Elland Road challenge amid Leeds United quality verdict
arts.sum: Blackburn Rovers will be 'ready' for the challenge of facing Leeds United this afternoon, as manager John Eustace looks to record their third consecutive win over the Whites. However, following 1-0 wins for Blackburn in their last two encounters with Leeds, Eustace is relishing the challenge of going toe-to-toe with what he considers to be the 'top team in the division'.

arts.ttl: Leeds United keeping tabs on 25-year-old’s progress
arts.sum: Leeds United have been tracking Millwall defender Japhet Tanganga, as detailed in a report by the Express. Leeds… The post Leeds United keeping tabs on 25-year-old’s progress appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Blackburn Rovers predicted team with four changes against Leeds
arts.sum: How Rovers could line up against the Championship leaders at Elland Road

arts.ttl: Leeds United squad revealed for Blackburn Rovers with rotation plan ready
arts.sum: Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community Leeds United manager Daniel Farke will have a strong - if weary - squad available to him for today's clash with Blackburn Rovers at Elland Road.

arts.ttl: Leeds United transfer talks now officially out of 49ers’ hands with new contract update
arts.sum: Leeds United left-back Junior Firpo is now free to discuss pre-contract agreements with clubs from abroad as the January window opens. Last season, Robin Koch signed a pre-contract agreement with Eintracht Frankfurt while on loan there, meaning he joined them as soon as his Elland Road deal expired.

arts.ttl: Is Leeds United vs Blackburn Rovers on TV? Kick-off time, live stream details and how to follow
arts.sum: Leeds United look to kick-off 2025 on the right note by establishing their spot at the top of the Championship, when they welcome Blackburn Rovers to Elland Road on New Year's Day. The Championship leaders have won their last three fixtures agains Oxford United, Stoke City and Derby County.

arts.ttl: Three Leeds United players ruled out, new Harry Gray update
arts.sum: Leeds United take on Blackburn Rovers on New Year’s Day looking to start 2025 as they mean to go on, top of the league with a two-point cushion. Up next to kick off the new year is a big test at Elland Road in the form of John Eustace’s Blackburn Rovers, one of the few sides that have beaten Leeds in the league this season.
Aidan Perkins previews the New Year's Day fixtures in the Championship and has a score prediction for all 12 games.

arts.ttl: Leeds United have £5m transfer decision to make ASAP amid major EFL manager news
arts.sum: Wayne Rooney has lost his job in the Championship with Plymouth Argyle parting ways this week, but it leaves Leeds United loanee Darko Gyabi in a peculiar situation. It’s the second time in almost a year Rooney has left a job in the Championship amid relegation fears after being sacked from Birmingham City following defeat against Leeds.
